summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of RAG Analytics app. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend shows excellent dark theme UI implementation, all dashboard tabs functional, and AI chat integration working smoothly.
passed_tests: CSV upload endpoint returns session_id, preview, summary, chart_data, pie_data
Ask AI endpoint returns proper AI responses with sources
Upload page renders with beautiful dark theme
CSV file upload via click/drag-drop works
Dashboard loads with all 4 tabs: Data Preview, Summary, Charts, Ask AI
Stats row shows correct totals: 12 Rows, 4 Groups, $552,346 Revenue, 5,430 Units Sold
Data Preview tab displays CSV table data
Summary tab shows aggregated data by category
Charts tab displays both bar chart (revenue) and pie chart (quantity)
Ask AI tab shows chat interface with example questions
Example questions populate input field when clicked
Chat bubbles styled correctly: user on right, AI on left
Typing indicator shows during AI processing
Reset/New upload button returns to upload screen
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (4/4 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (19/19 features working)
